meta.suspect_no_text_info_reason: 内容包含导师姓名、简介、联系方式、研究方向、教育背景、工作履历、学术兼职及详细学术成果等大量有效信息。

reviewer_for: IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering

academic_achievements.overview: 研究成果发表在IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics, IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems, IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering等国际期刊

representative_papers: Yang Wang, Dong Jiuxiang. A Modified Dynamic Event-Triggered Mechanism for Output Consensus of Heterogeneous MASs. IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics, 2025, 55(1): 383 - 394.

Yang Wang, Dong Jiuxiang, Meng Fanwei, Ju H. Park. A Hybrid Triggering Consensus Framework to Nonlinear Multiagent Systems With Local Observer. IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems, 2025, early access, doi: 10.1109/TSMC.2025.3612577.

Yang Wang, Dong Jiuxiang. Distributed Adaptive Observer-Based Fault-Tolerant Output Consensus for Heterogeneous MASs. IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems, 2024, 54(4): 2414-2425.

Yang Wang, Dong Jiuxiang. Dynamic Surface Asymptotic Fault-Tolerant Control for Constrained Nonlinear Systems With Unknown Virtual Control Coefficients. IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems, 2024, 54(7): 3984-3993.

Yang Wang, Dong Jiuxiang, Ju H. Park. Observer-Based Containment Control for Multiagent Systems by a Node-Based Hybrid Triggering Mechanism. IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, 2025, 22: 20249 - 20262.

Yang Wang, Dong Jiuxiang. Observer-Based Adaptive Consensus for Lipschitz Nonlinear Multiagent Systems via Asynchronous Event-Triggered Strategy. IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, 2025, 22: 2734-2745.

Yang Wang, Dong Jiuxiang. Data-Driven Learning for Resilient Synchronization and Parameter Estimation of Heterogeneous Nonlinear Multiagent Systems. IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, 2024, 21(4): 6992-7003.

Yang Wang, Dong Jiuxiang. Distributed fault-tolerant consensus for one-sided Lipschitz multiagent systems based on error decomposition and jointly observable condition. Information Sciences, 2024, 657: 119994.

Yang Wang, Dong Jiuxiang, Meng Fanwei. Dynamic edge event-triggered consensus for one-sided Lipschitz multiagent systems with disturbances. International Journal of Robust and Nonlinear Control, 2023, 33(10): 5305-5321.
